catalog_price:
• $325.00  (Build & Generate Family Tree)

  1. This is a one-time cost that covers building the foundation, configuring the architecture, building the root branch, and generating the family tree.  It also covers monitoring and responding to the tree's clicks.
  2. The root branch is configured to display the root's photo, age, year born, year died (if deceased), and the root's narrative.  The names of the root's descendant children are arranged (in birth sequence order).
  3. After the root's family tree is generated, the root's descendant children can begin building out their branches, at their birth sequence, on the root's family tree.
  4. At this point, the root's newly generated family tree is not functional.  The root's family tree becomes functional (i.e. responds to clicks), as the root's descendant children add their family branches to the root's family tree.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Family Tree)
  • Root Narrative Limited to 200 Words.
  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
  • If root is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death

catalog_price:
• $125.00  (Build and Configure Family Tree Branch)
  • $15.00  (Per Optional Child Click)

  1. Building out their family tree branches, on their parent's tree, is how descendant children add themselves and their children to their parent's family tree.
  2. From generation to generation, descendant children (who have children of their own), must build out their family tree branch, at their birth sequence, on their parent's tree.
  3. If a descendant child is under age, the parent can add a child click to display the under age child's information.
  4. Activating descendant child clicks and adding child narratives are optional (you don't have to do).
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Head-of-Family)
  • Family Tree Branch Narrative Limited to 200 Words.
  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
  • If the family branch head is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death

  • Per (Child Click)
  • The Following fields Are Displayed:
    1. Child Photo
    2. Computed Age
    3. Year Born
  • If child is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:
    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death

catalog_price:
• $20.00  Per (Child Click)

  • If Child Clicks are not purchased, the child's name will be displayed underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.

  • If you built a family tree branch (above) without including optional child clicks, because the branch was closed (without them), there's an additional cost to add them after branch closure.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Child Click)
  • The Following fields Are Displayed:
    1. Child Photo
    2. Computed Age
    3. Year Born
  • If child is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death

catalog_price:
• $25.00 Per (Child Narrative)

  • Child narratives are optional.  If not purchased, when the descendant child's Family Tree Link is clicked, no narrative will appear.

  • Only Family Tree Branches for head-of-family have 200 word narratives included in their price. Child Narratives are at additional cost.
  • A child narrative can be used to pay a special tribute, memorialize a dearly departed loved one, give praise, or give a synopsis of a person's life story.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Child Narrative)
  • Child Narrative Limited to 200 Words.
  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
